ICD10_CNCR_DGNS_CD_RPTD 

LABEL: ICD10 Cancer Diagnosis Code Reported by Participant 

DESCRIPTION: ICD10 cancer diagnosis code reported by participant. The diagnosis code for the cancer type is 
classified using the International Classification of Diseases, 10
th Revision, clinical modification (ICD-10-
CM). 

SHORT NAME: ICD10_CNCR_DGNS_CD_RPTD
